docblock.description: TestCase trait
Internal method to create a copy of an image file
Internal method to create some thumbs
Asserts that the contents of one image file is equal to the contents of another image file

tag.name: param
tag.description: The failure message that will be appended to the generated message

docblock.description: Asserts for a valid thumbnail path

tag.name: param
tag.description: The failure message that will be appended to the generated message

docblock.description: Returns an instance of `ThumbCreator`

tag.name: param
tag.description: Path of the image from which to create the thumbnail. It can be a relative path (to APP/webroot/img), a full path or a remote url

docblock.description: Returns an instance of `ThumbCreator`, after calling `resize()` and `save()` methods.
docblock.long-description: It can be called passing only the array of options as first argument.

tag.name: param
tag.description: Path of the image from which to create the thumbnail. It can be a full path or a remote url

docblock.description: Skips the test if you running the designated driver
This file is part of php-thumber.
docblock.long-description: Licensed under The MIT License For full copyright and license information, please see the LICENSE.txt Redistributions of files must retain the above copyright notice.

docblock.description: NotReadableImageException
Construct the exception

tag.name: param
tag.description: The previous exception used for the exception chaining

docblock.description: This file is part of php-thumber.
docblock.long-description: Licensed under The MIT License For full copyright and license information, please see the LICENSE.txt Redistributions of files must retain the above copyright notice.

docblock.description: Utility to create a thumb.
docblock.long-description: Please, refer to the `README` file to know how to use the utility and to see examples.

docblock.description: `ImageManager` instance
Arguments that will be used to generate the name of the thumbnail.
docblock.long-description: Every time you call a method that alters the final thumbnail, its arguments must be added to this array, including the name of that method.

docblock.description: Callbacks that will be called by the `save()` method to create the thumbnail
Driver name
Path of the file from which the thumbnail will be generated
Path of the generated thumbnail
Construct.
docblock.long-description: It sets the file path and extension.

tag.name: param
tag.description: Path of the image from which to create the thumbnail. It can be a full path or a remote url

docblock.description: Internal method to get default options for the `save()` method

tag.name: return
tag.description: Passed options added to the default options

docblock.description: Gets an `Image` instance
Crops the image, cutting out a rectangular part of the image.
docblock.long-description: You can define optional coordinates to move the top-left corner of the cutout to a certain position.

tag.name: fluent
tag.description: This method is part of a fluent interface and will return the same instance

docblock.description: Resizes the image, combining cropping and resizing to format image in a smart way. It will find the best fitting aspect ratio on the current image automatically, cut it out and resize it to the given dimension

tag.name: fluent
tag.description: This method is part of a fluent interface and will return the same instance

docblock.description: Resizes the image

tag.name: fluent
tag.description: This method is part of a fluent interface and will return the same instance

docblock.description: Resizes the boundaries of the current image to given width and height. An anchor can be defined to determine from what point of the image the resizing is going to happen. Set the mode to relative to add or subtract the given width or height to the actual image dimensions. You can also pass a background color for the emerging area of the image

tag.name: fluent
tag.description: This method is part of a fluent interface and will return the same instance

docblock.description: Saves the thumbnail and returns its path
This file is part of php-thumber.
docblock.long-description: Licensed under The MIT License For full copyright and license information, please see the LICENSE.txt Redistributions of files must retain the above copyright notice.

docblock.description: UnsupportedImageTypeException
Image type
Construct the exception

tag.name: param
tag.description: The previous exception used for the exception chaining

docblock.description: Gets the unsupported image type
This file is part of php-thumber.
docblock.long-description: Licensed under The MIT License For full copyright and license information, please see the LICENSE.txt Redistributions of files must retain the above copyright notice.

docblock.description: A utility to manage thumbnails
Supported formats
Internal method to clear thumbnails

tag.name: return
tag.description: Number of thumbnails deleted otherwise `false` in case of error

docblock.description: Internal method to find thumbnails

tag.name: param
tag.description: A pattern (a regexp, a glob, or a string)

docblock.description: Clears all thumbnails that have been generated from an image path

tag.name: return
tag.description: Number of thumbnails deleted otherwise `false` in case of error

docblock.description: Clears all thumbnails

tag.name: return
tag.description: Number of thumbnails deleted otherwise `false` in case of error

docblock.description: Gets all thumbnails that have been generated from an image path
Gets all thumbnails
This file is part of php-thumber.
docblock.long-description: Licensed under The MIT License For full copyright and license information, please see the LICENSE.txt Redistributions of files must retain the above copyright notice.

docblock.description: TestCase class
Called after every test method
Internal method to create a copy of an image file
Internal method to create some thumbs
Asserts that the contents of one image file is equal to the contents of another image file

tag.name: param
tag.description: The failure message that will be appended to the generated message

docblock.description: Asserts for a valid thumbnail path

tag.name: param
tag.description: The failure message that will be appended to the generated message

docblock.description: Returns an instance of `ThumbCreator`

tag.name: param
tag.description: Path of the image from which to create the thumbnail. It can be a relative path (to APP/webroot/img), a full path or a remote url

docblock.description: Returns an instance of `ThumbCreator`, after calling `resize()` and `save()` methods.
docblock.long-description: It can be called passing only the array of options as first argument.

tag.name: param
tag.description: Path of the image from which to create the thumbnail. It can be a full path or a remote url

docblock.description: Skips the test if you running the designated driver
